name: mirofish-offline
description: MiroFish-Offline: self-hosted swarm intelligence engine (Neo4j + any OpenAI-compatible API)

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:services && npm run dev
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.lint: concurrently -n "py,js" "cd backend && uv run ruff check app run.py scripts" "cd frontend && npm run lint"
